behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files, function/interface/extension names, the deprecation message string, the @Suppress annotation, and the test method to remove.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to remove and what to migrate to, but doesn't show exact code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of deprecated identifiers and that tests still pass; alternative correct migrations would still satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests compile sources via kotlinc and run JUnit test classes via subprocess, verifying behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests require actual removal of code AND p2p tests require successful compilation and test execution; a stub couldn't satisfy both.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All required removals (APIs, imports, suppress annotation, test method) and migrations are tested, plus all named test classes are run.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have docstrings and are grouped under fail-to-pass and pass-to-pass section comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers in instruction match those used in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but localization is part of the task definition (removing specific deprecated APIs); no line numbers given.
